mapper.sql: news_id,user_id,news_type_id, subject, news_title, news_content, link, publish_time, news_attr, news_image, order_num, type, is_public, thumbs, visits, comments, collects, news_source,news_source_author,news_source_tags,status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, to_static, static_file_path

select n.news_id, n.user_id, n.news_type_id, n.subject, n.news_title, -- 列表不需要返回富文本 -- n.news_content, n.link, n.publish_time, n.news_attr, n.news_image, n.order_num, n.type, n.is_public, n.thumbs, n.visits, n.comments, n.collects, n.news_source, n.news_source_author, n.news_source_tags, n.status, n.del_flag, n.create_by, n.create_time, n.update_by, n.update_time, n.remark, n.to_static, n.static_file_path, nt.news_type_name from news n left join news_type nt on n.news_type_id = nt.news_type_id
mapper.insert: insert into ${tableString}(user_id, news_type_name, type_name, news_title, news_content, publish_time, link, news_image, order_num, status_name, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, subject_name) values (#{newsBase.userId}, #{newsBase.newsTypeName}, #{newsBase.typeName}, #{newsBase.newsTitle}, #{newsBase.newsContent}, #{newsBase.publishTime}, #{newsBase.link}, #{newsBase.newsImage}, #{newsBase.orderNum}, #{newsBase.statusName}, #{newsBase.delFlag}, #{newsBase.createBy}, #{newsBase.createTime}, #{newsBase.updateBy}, #{newsBase.updateTime}, #{newsBase.remark}, #{newsBase.subjectName});
